utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all six top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details:
- property: includes selected property with details (address, bedrooms, bathrooms, square footage, price) and even taxes. Fully specified.
- financing: includes a financing solution and terms (LTV, down payment estimate, interest rate range, amortization/term info, arrangement fee). Fully specified.
- legal_services: includes service description and costs. Fully specified.
- moving_services: includes service description and costs. Fully specified.
- setup_services: includes service description and costs. Fully specified.
- total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown with line items and a summed initial cash outlay. Fully specified (even includes property survey cost not elsewhere, but it’s fine). All six items are present and detailed.
